subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Thou Who holdest in Thy grasp the reins of all created things! I beseech Thee by the Meanings which, though they cannot be expressed by words
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من فی قبضتک زمام الکائنات و ازمه الموجودات اسئلک بالمعانی التی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @love as fire, @Mosaic imagery
